nodes.title: San Antonio Sports and The PM Group Keep Winning Together
Millennial Grocery Shoppers Have Begun Using Online-Only Stores
Some 22% of Senior Ad Buyers Plan to Advertise on Snapchat in 2016

pageContext.content: In the last year, Stephanie has won a local Silver Addy and a Regional Bronze for her work on San Antonio Pet’s Alive. She has continued to spearhead the creative internship program – finding candidates, interviewing, keeping them on task and mentoring them. She has steadily improved in her skill set – being the first to receive a certificate for successfully completing a multi-level online Social Media course. All while keeping our candy dish full and bringing in her amazing examples of edible creativity (her cookies). All of that and her never give up attitude has led to her being promoted to Senior Art Director at The PM Group. I would encourage you all to drop by and give Steph a big “Way-To-Go”.
pageContext.title: Well Deserved

seo.metaDesc: The PM Group is proud to spotlight our award-winning graphic designer for her work on San Antonio Pet's Alive, winning 2 awards.
